start_greeting:
Habari. Uliza swali — nitajibu kupitia Claude.
Amri: /new — anza kipindi kipya cha Claude Code.
new_session_confirmation: Kipindi kipya cha Claude Code kimeanza. Muktadha umefutwa.
sess_list_empty: Hakuna vipindi bado. Tuma ujumbe — nitaunda cha kwanza.
error_internal: Internal error: {error}. See logs for details.
agent_timeout: ⌛ Agent did not respond in {seconds}s. Try /new and retry.
agent_stalled: ⌛ Wakala ameacha kuripoti maendeleo ya kazi hii. Nimesimamisha hatua iliyokwama. Tuma kazi tena au tumia /new kupata kipindi safi.
unauthorized_callback: This button is for a different chat.
plan_mode_usage: Usage: `/plan <what to plan>`. Example: `/plan refactor the auth module`.
plan_mode_engaged: 📋 Plan mode engaged. Waiting for the agent's plan…
plan_mode_armed: 📋 Plan mode armed. Send the task as the next message — text or voice. /cancel to abort.
bot_command_whoami: Who am I to this bot
stop_idle: 🛑 Nothing to interrupt — no active session.
mode_pick: 🛡 Current mode: `{current}`. Pick a new one:
model_pick:
🧠 Mtoa huduma: `{provider}`
Modeli ya sasa: `{current}`. Chagua mpya:
whoami_body:
👤 **{name}**

| Sehemu | Thamani |
|---|---|
| Jina la mtumiaji | {username} |
| user_id | `{user_id}` |
| chat_id | `{chat_id}` |
| Lugha | {lang} |
| Premium | {premium} |
| Ufikiaji | {access} |
| Hali | `{mode}` |
| Kipindi | {session} |
help_example_mode: example: `/mode plan` or `/mode` for inline buttons
help_example_model: example: `/model claude-sonnet-4-6` or `/model` for inline buttons
help_example_stop: interrupts the current response, preserves context
help_example_info: CLI version, output style, list of slash commands
approval_timeout: ⌛ Muda wa idhini umeisha — ombi limekataliwa.
btn_always: ♾️ Ruhusu kila wakati katika kipindi hiki
aq_pick_multi: (pick one or more; tap “Done” when finished)
plan_rejected_with_feedback: 🚫 Plan rejected — feedback handed back to the agent.
default_system_prompt: Wewe ni msaidizi wa Telegram mwenye urafiki. Jibu kwa ufupi.
access_denied:
🔒 Ufikiaji wa boti hii umezuiliwa.

Telegram chat ID yako: `{chat_id}`

Mtumie msimamizi wa boti — ataongeza ID hiyo kwenye `allowed_chat_ids` katika `config.json`, kisha utaweza kuzungumza na boti.
voice_disabled: 🎙 Voice transcription is not configured: groq_api_key is missing.
voice_empty: 🎙 Could not detect any speech in the audio.
upload_disabled: 📎 File uploads are not configured: set `uploads_dir` in config.json.
upload_pending: 📎 File saved. Describe what to do with it in the next message.
upload_too_large: 📎 File too large: {size_mb:.1f} MB > limit {limit_mb:.1f} MB.
file_delivery_no_roots: 📎 Utumaji wa faili haupatikani: hakuna saraka ya kazi iliyowekwa.
file_delivery_denied: 📎 Haiwezekani kutuma faili nje ya saraka zinazoruhusiwa: `{path}`
file_delivery_too_large: 📎 Faili ni kubwa mno: `{path}` ({size_mb:.1f} MB > {limit_mb:.1f} MB).
task_disabled: Tasks are disabled in this bot's config.
task_usage:
Task management:
/task add <schedule> | <prompt> — LLM task
/task add <schedule> --script <file> — script task (admin)
/task list — list
/task show <id> — detail
/task pause <id> / resume <id>
/task run <id> — run now
/task rm <id> — delete

Schedule: "2h", "every 30m", "0 9 * * *", "2026-07-01T09:00".
Flags: --global (admin), --name <name>, --exclusive.
task_admin_only: Only an admin can create global and script tasks.
task_no_broadcast_targets: No broadcast targets for the global task.
help_example_task: e.g. `/task add every 1d | summarize my notes`, `/task list`
